ast.name: ArbiterEscrow

functions.name: __covenant_policy_release

left.span: checkSig(auth_x, prev_states[0].buyer) && checkSig(auth_y, prev_states[0].seller) || checkSig(auth_x, prev_states[0].buyer) && checkSig(auth_y, prev_states[0].arbiter)

expr.span: checkSig(auth_x, prev_states[0].buyer) && checkSig(auth_y, prev_states[0].seller) || checkSig(auth_x, prev_states[0].buyer) && checkSig(auth_y, prev_states[0].arbiter) || checkSig(auth_x, prev_states[0].seller) && checkSig(auth_y, prev_states[0].arbiter)

data.span: require(checkSig(auth_x, prev_states[0].buyer) && checkSig(auth_y, prev_states[0].seller) || checkSig(auth_x, prev_states[0].buyer) && checkSig(auth_y, prev_states[0].arbiter) || checkSig(auth_x, prev_states[0].seller) && checkSig(auth_y, prev_states[0].arbiter));

exprs.span: { buyer: prev_states[0].buyer, seller: prev_states[0].seller, arbiter: prev_states[0].arbiter, amount: prev_states[0].amount, settled: 1 }

data.span: return({ buyer: prev_states[0].buyer, seller: prev_states[0].seller, arbiter: prev_states[0].arbiter, amount: prev_states[0].amount, settled: 1 });

functions.name: __leader_release
__delegate_release
